title: Google for Startups on Instagram: "@Yoodli.ai is committed to ...
full_text:
31 likes, 1 comments - googleforstartups on November 26, 2025: "@Yoodli.ai is committed to empowering millions to speak with confidence. 💡🚀
Built on @GoogleGemini and powered by @GoogleCloud, Yoodli uses AI roleplays to provide real-time feedback to get teams pitch-ready. Founder Esha Joshi turned her communication struggles into a mission.
How is Gemini helping your startup grow your user base? 👇".
